untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires visual/structural pattern recognition (consolidation zone identification, trend line fitting, flag-like shape validation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires dynamic pattern detection rather than simple technical indicator thresholds. Used Donchian channels as proxy for breakout detection, but true flag pattern logic is not translatable.
translation_notes: Signal describes a consolidation pattern with breakout characteristics. Mapped consolidation detection to Donchian channel breakouts (close outside upper/lower band). Used 2-day hold_days_max per entry condition. Applied volume filter (hvol_20) to confirm breakout strength. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal is BOTH bullish and bearish depending on breakout direction. Bull success rate 64% and target moves of 20%/13% noted in parameters but not directly encoded as stops/targets.
